abf_relevance.notes: Second largest CoWoS customer after NVIDIA. MI300X/MI350X accelerators drive significant ABF demand.

data_completeness.notes: All major fields present. Product portfolio well documented from official sources.

source_quality.notes: 4 AMD official URLs successfully accessed. T2 rating.

financial_data.notes: Revenue (~$28-30B) and market cap (~$200B) approximate. Exact quarterly figures not retrieved.

swot_quality.notes: Comprehensive SWOT covering ROCm ecosystem, server CPU gains, and CoWoS allocation challenges.

reviewer_notes: AMD is the second most important ABF demand driver via Instinct GPU CoWoS packaging. EPYC server CPU growth also contributes to substrate consumption. Official website data confirmed product details.
